tagline.en: V4 flagship — high performance, strong reasoning, very low call cost
tagline.zh-CN: V4 高性能版（Pro），推理能力强，调用成本极低

parameters.zh-CN: 总参数 1.6 万亿（每次推理激活 490 亿）

description.en: DeepSeek-V4-Pro is the high-performance edition in DeepSeek's latest V4 flagship line, built for demanding reasoning and generation with very low invocation cost.
description.zh-CN: DeepSeek-V4-Pro 是深度求索最新 V4 旗舰系列中的高性能版（Pro），面向高要求推理与生成任务，调用成本极低。

description.en: Together with V4-Flash, the V4 family covers both peak capability and high-speed, low-cost deployment—Pro prioritizes reasoning strength for complex workloads.
description.zh-CN: 与 V4-Flash 共同构成 V4 系列：兼顾旗舰能力与高速低成本部署，Pro 侧重复杂负载下的推理能力。

description.en: DeepSeek-V4-Pro shows that flagship-grade reasoning can be delivered at extremely low call cost, supporting the view that relatively low-cost models can still achieve high performance.
description.zh-CN: DeepSeek-V4-Pro 表明：旗舰级推理可在极低调用成本下交付，进一步印证相对较低成本的模型同样能够达到高性能。

summary.en: V4 high-performance edition with strong reasoning and very low call cost.
summary.zh-CN: V4 高性能版，推理能力强，调用成本极低。

tagline.en: V4 high-speed, low-cost edition — strong reasoning, very low call cost
tagline.zh-CN: V4 高速低成本版（Flash），推理能力强，调用成本极低

parameters.zh-CN: 总参数 2840 亿（每次推理激活 130 亿）

description.en: DeepSeek-V4-Flash is the high-speed, low-cost edition in the V4 flagship line, pairing strong reasoning with very low invocation cost for high-frequency production use.
description.zh-CN: DeepSeek-V4-Flash 是 V4 旗舰系列中的高速低成本版（Flash），在保持较强推理能力的同时，以极低调用成本支撑高频生产调用。

description.en: It complements V4-Pro within the latest V4 generation: Flash emphasizes throughput and economy where Pro emphasizes peak performance, both under the same low-cost positioning.
description.zh-CN: 与 V4-Pro 共同构成最新 V4 代际：Flash 侧重吞吐与经济性，Pro 侧重峰值性能，二者均强调低成本优势。

description.en: DeepSeek-V4-Flash reinforces that high-speed, low-cost tiers can still deliver strong reasoning performance, illustrating that relatively low-cost models can achieve high performance at scale.
description.zh-CN: DeepSeek-V4-Flash 进一步表明：高速低成本档位仍可保持较强推理表现，印证相对较低成本的模型同样能够规模化达到高性能。

summary.en: V4 high-speed low-cost edition with strong reasoning and very low call cost.
summary.zh-CN: V4 高速低成本版，推理能力强，调用成本极低。

tagline.en: High value — MoE, coding, reasoning, long-context optimization
tagline.zh-CN: 高性价比，MoE 架构，代码生成、逻辑推理、长上下文优化

description.en: DeepSeek-V3 / V3.1 is built on a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture, emphasizing high cost performance alongside code generation, logical reasoning, and long-context optimization.
description.zh-CN: DeepSeek-V3 / V3.1 采用 MoE 架构，侧重高性价比，并覆盖代码生成、逻辑推理与长上下文优化。

description.en: It suits development assistants, analytical workflows, and long-document tasks where MoE efficiency helps control inference cost while maintaining strong general capability.
description.zh-CN: 适用于开发助手、分析工作流与长文档任务——MoE 效率有助于控制推理成本，同时保持稳健的通用能力。

description.en: The V3 / V3.1 line demonstrates that MoE design can deliver coding and reasoning performance at practical deployment cost, supporting the view that relatively low-cost models can still achieve high performance.
description.zh-CN: V3 / V3.1 表明：MoE 设计可在务实部署成本下交付编程与推理能力，进一步印证相对较低成本的模型同样能够达到高性能。

title.en: DeepSeek-V3 / V3.1 Listed on BeyondMax AI
title.zh-CN: DeepSeek-V3 / V3.1 上架 BeyondMax AI

summary.en: Catalog entry with polished capability overview.
summary.zh-CN: 图鉴条目已更新润色后的能力说明。

tagline.en: Chain-of-thought reasoning — math, coding, complex logic, visible internal thinking
tagline.zh-CN: 思维链展示，推理模型，数学与编程，复杂逻辑分析，内部思考过程

description.en: DeepSeek-R1 is a reasoning model that exposes chain-of-thought style deliberation, with visible internal thinking before final answers—oriented toward mathematics, programming, and complex logical analysis.
description.zh-CN: DeepSeek-R1 是推理模型，可展示思维链式推演并呈现内部思考过程，面向数学、编程与复杂逻辑分析任务。

description.en: It fits workloads that benefit from inspectable reasoning steps, such as proof-style problems, algorithm design, and multi-stage analytical tasks.
description.zh-CN: 适用于需要可检视推理步骤的工作负载，如证明类问题、算法设计与多阶段分析任务。

description.en: DeepSeek-R1 shows that transparent, reasoning-first models can be deployed at practical cost while still delivering high performance on math, code, and logic-intensive tasks.
description.zh-CN: DeepSeek-R1 表明：透明推理型模型可在务实成本下部署，并在数学、代码与逻辑密集型任务上达到高性能，进一步印证低成本亦可支撑高性能。

summary.en: Catalog entry with polished capability overview.
summary.zh-CN: 图鉴条目已更新润色后的能力说明。

tagline.en: AI Agent — 35h autonomous runs, coding agent, tools, code gen, 1M context
tagline.zh-CN: AI Agent 优化，长周期自主执行（35 小时），编程智能体、工具调用、代码生成、百万上下文

description.en: Qwen3.7-Max is optimized for AI agents, supporting long-horizon autonomous execution (up to 35 hours), a coding agent with tool calling and code generation, and a 1 million-token context window.
description.zh-CN: Qwen3.7-Max 面向 AI Agent 场景优化，支持最长约 35 小时的长周期自主执行，具备编程智能体、工具调用与代码生成能力，并提供百万级上下文。

description.en: It targets end-to-end agent pipelines—software automation, multi-step research, and tool-augmented coding—where sustained autonomy and large context must work together.
description.zh-CN: 适用于端到端智能体流水线——软件自动化、多步研究与工具增强编程——需要自主执行与超大上下文协同的场景。

description.en: Qwen3.7-Max illustrates that long-horizon agent workloads can be served at practical deployment cost, reinforcing that relatively low-cost models can still achieve high performance on complex autonomous tasks.
description.zh-CN: Qwen3.7-Max 表明：长周期智能体负载可在务实部署成本下承接，进一步印证相对较低成本的模型同样能够在复杂自主任务上达到高性能。

summary.en: Catalog entry with polished capability overview.

tagline.en: Flagship — strong overall capability, multimodal (image/video/audio), enterprise
tagline.zh-CN: 旗舰模型，综合能力强，多模态识别（图/视/音频），企业级应用

description.en: Qwen3-Max / Qwen-Max is the flagship tier in the Tongyi Qwen family, offering strong overall capability, multimodal understanding across image, video, and audio, and positioning for enterprise applications.
description.zh-CN: Qwen3-Max / Qwen-Max 是通义千问旗舰档位，综合能力强，支持图像、视频与音频的多模态识别，面向企业级应用。

description.en: It suits organization-wide assistants, multimodal analytics, and production workflows that require balanced quality across modalities in one stack.
description.zh-CN: 适用于企业级助手、多模态分析与需要在同一技术栈内跨模态保持质量的生产工作流。

description.en: The flagship line shows that enterprise-grade multimodal performance can be accessed at practical cost tiers, supporting the view that relatively low-cost models can still reach high performance in production.
description.zh-CN: 旗舰系列表明：企业级多模态能力可在务实成本档位获取，进一步印证相对较低成本的模型同样能够在生产环境中达到高性能。

summary.en: Catalog entry with polished capability overview.

tagline.en: Plus for value — Flash for speed; high concurrency, low latency, RAG
tagline.zh-CN: Plus 性价比之选，Flash 极速轻量版，高并发、低延迟，RAG 应用

description.en: Qwen-Plus and Qwen-Flash are complementary tiers: Plus emphasizes cost performance for everyday workloads, while Flash is a lightweight, ultra-fast edition for high concurrency and low latency—both suited to RAG applications.
description.zh-CN: Qwen-Plus 与 Qwen-Flash 为互补档位：Plus 侧重日常负载的性价比，Flash 为极速轻量版，面向高并发与低延迟，二者均适用于 RAG 应用。

description.en: Teams can route latency-sensitive, high-QPS traffic to Flash and knowledge-heavy, quality-balanced tasks to Plus within the same Qwen ecosystem.
description.zh-CN: 团队可在同一通义生态内将时延敏感的高 QPS 流量导向 Flash，将知识密集型、质量均衡的任务导向 Plus。

description.en: Together they demonstrate that RAG and high-concurrency serving do not require flagship pricing to reach strong practical performance—relatively low-cost models can still achieve high performance.
description.zh-CN: 二者共同表明：RAG 与高并发服务无需旗舰定价亦可获得强劲实用表现，进一步印证相对较低成本的模型同样能够达到高性能。

title.en: Qwen-Plus / Qwen-Flash Listed on BeyondMax AI
title.zh-CN: Qwen-Plus / Qwen-Flash 上架 BeyondMax AI

summary.zh-CN: 图鉴条目已更新润色后的能力说明。

tagline.en: Ultra-long context (1M tokens) — long-doc summary, filings, legal contracts
tagline.zh-CN: 极长上下文（100 万 tokens），长文档摘要、财报分析、法律合同审查

description.en: Qwen-Long provides an ultra-long context window of 1 million tokens, built for long-document summarization, large-scale financial report analysis, and legal contract review.
description.zh-CN: Qwen-Long 提供 100 万 token 极长上下文，面向长文档摘要、海量财报分析与法律合同审查。

description.en: It reduces the need to chunk or pipeline very large corpora when fidelity across the full text matters in a single pass.
description.zh-CN: 当需要在单次处理中保持全文保真时，可减少对超大规模语料的分块与流水线拆分。

description.en: Qwen-Long shows that million-token understanding can be offered at practical deployment cost, supporting the view that relatively low-cost models can still achieve high performance on long-context workloads.
description.zh-CN: Qwen-Long 表明：百万级上下文理解可在务实部署成本下提供，进一步印证相对较低成本的模型同样能够在长上下文负载上达到高性能。

summary.en: Catalog entry with polished capability overview.
summary.zh-CN: 图鉴条目已更新润色后的能力说明。

tagline.en: May 2026 — elastic training, 1/3 compression, ~6% peer training cost, writing, search, agents
tagline.zh-CN: 2026.05 最新版，弹性训练、参数压缩 1/3、训练成本约为同行 6%，创意写作、深度搜索、智能体

description.en: ERNIE 5.1 (May 2026) introduces an elastic training framework with parameter compression to one-third of prior scale and training cost at roughly 6% of peers, while strengthening creative writing, deep search, and agent tasks.
description.zh-CN: ERNIE 5.1（2026 年 5 月）采用弹性训练框架，参数压缩至约 1/3，训练成本约为同行的 6%，并强化创意写作、深度搜索与智能体任务能力。

description.en: It targets content teams, research assistants, and agent workflows that need reliable retrieval, generation, and multi-step execution under controlled training economics.
description.zh-CN: 面向需要可靠检索、生成与多步执行的内容团队、研究助手与智能体工作流，并在训练经济性上保持可控。

description.en: ERNIE 5.1 demonstrates that frontier-style writing, search, and agent capability can be pursued at substantially lower training cost, supporting the view that relatively low-cost models can still achieve high performance.
description.zh-CN: ERNIE 5.1 表明：前沿级写作、搜索与智能体能力可在显著更低的训练成本下实现，进一步印证相对较低成本的模型同样能够达到高性能。

description.en: ERNIE 4.5 / 4.0 Turbo delivers high performance with fast inference, multimodal capabilities including text-to-image and image understanding, and a 128K-token context window.
description.zh-CN: ERNIE 4.5 / 4.0 Turbo 具备高性能与较快推理速度，支持文生图与图片理解等多模态能力，并提供 128K 上下文。

description.en: Typical uses include content creation and enterprise knowledge bases where text and visual inputs must be handled in one workflow.
description.zh-CN: 适用于内容创作、企业知识库等需在同一工作流中处理文本与视觉输入的场景。

description.en: The line shows that fast multimodal inference and long-context coverage can be delivered at practical deployment cost, reinforcing that relatively low-cost models can still achieve high performance.
description.zh-CN: 该系列表明：快速多模态推理与长上下文覆盖可在务实部署成本下交付，进一步印证相对较低成本的模型同样能够达到高性能。

tagline.en: Deep-thinking model for complex reasoning and tool collaboration
tagline.zh-CN: 深度思考模型，面向复杂推理与工具协同

description.en: ERNIE-X1 is Baidu's deep-thinking model oriented toward complex reasoning and tool collaboration, designed for workloads that require extended deliberation and coordinated use of external capabilities.
description.zh-CN: ERNIE-X1 是百度推出的深度思考模型，侧重复杂推理与工具协同，面向需要较长思考链条并配合外部能力完成任务的工作负载。

description.en: It fits multi-step analysis, decision support, and agent-style flows where the model must reason deeply while invoking tools to retrieve information or execute actions.
description.zh-CN: 适用于多步分析、决策辅助及智能体类流程——模型在深度推理的同时调用工具完成信息检索或动作执行。

description.en: ERNIE-X1 shows that high-complexity reasoning and tool collaboration can be delivered at practical deployment cost, supporting the view that relatively low-cost models can still achieve high performance on demanding tasks.
description.zh-CN: ERNIE-X1 表明：高复杂度推理与工具协同可在可接受的部署成本下落地，进一步印证相对较低成本的模型同样能够在高难度任务上达到高性能。

description.en: GLM-4.7 emphasizes Agentic Coding, long-horizon task planning, and tool collaboration, alongside code generation, a natural conversational tone, and immersive writing.
description.zh-CN: GLM-4.7 强化 Agentic Coding、长程任务规划与工具协同能力，并覆盖代码生成、自然回复风格与沉浸式写作。

description.en: It targets software engineering assistants, multi-stage project workflows, and content production where sustained planning and tool use must stay coherent across long sessions.
description.zh-CN: 适用于软件工程助手、多阶段项目工作流，以及需要在长会话中保持规划与工具调用一致性的内容生产场景。

description.en: GLM-4.7 illustrates that agent-grade coding and long-horizon planning can be achieved at practical cost, reinforcing that relatively low-cost models can deliver high performance on complex development and writing tasks.
description.zh-CN: GLM-4.7 表明：智能体级编程与长程规划可在务实成本下实现，进一步印证相对较低成本的模型同样能够在复杂开发与写作任务上达到高性能。

tagline.en: Iterative upgrade — general foundation capabilities and reasoning efficiency
tagline.zh-CN: 迭代升级，通用基础能力与推理效率

description.en: GLM-5 is Zhipu AI's iterative upgrade to the GLM line, strengthening general foundation capabilities and improving reasoning efficiency across common dialogue and analysis workloads.
description.zh-CN: GLM-5 是智谱 GLM 体系的迭代升级版本，在通用基础能力与推理效率上进一步强化，覆盖日常对话与分析类负载。

description.en: It serves as a balanced base model for enterprise assistants, knowledge Q&A, and mixed workloads where stable quality and efficient inference matter.
description.zh-CN: 适用于企业助手、知识问答及混合负载等对稳定质量与高效推理均有要求的场景。

description.en: GLM-5 demonstrates that upgraded general-purpose performance and reasoning efficiency can be offered at practical deployment cost, supporting the view that relatively low-cost models can still reach high performance on everyday complex tasks.
description.zh-CN: GLM-5 表明：通用能力与推理效率的升级可在务实部署成本下交付，进一步印证相对较低成本的模型同样能够在日常复杂任务上达到高性能。

tagline.en: Multimodal vision understanding and image analysis
tagline.zh-CN: 多模态视觉理解、图像分析

description.en: GLM-4V extends the GLM family with multimodal vision understanding and image analysis, enabling models to interpret visual inputs alongside text instructions.
description.zh-CN: GLM-4V 在 GLM 体系上扩展多模态视觉理解与图像分析能力，可在文本指令之外解读视觉输入。

description.en: Typical uses include chart and screenshot interpretation, visual Q&A, and workflows that combine documents with figures in one session.
description.zh-CN: 适用于图表与截图解读、视觉问答，以及在同一轮交互中混合文档与图像的工作流。

description.en: GLM-4V shows that strong multimodal vision analysis can be delivered at practical cost, supporting the view that relatively low-cost models can still achieve high performance on vision-heavy tasks.
description.zh-CN: GLM-4V 表明：多模态视觉分析可在务实成本下落地，进一步印证相对较低成本的模型同样能够在视觉密集型任务上达到高性能。

description.en: Kimi K2.6 is Moonshot AI's latest flagship, featuring swarm mode and large-scale agent collaboration (on the order of hundreds of agents), together with multimodal understanding, thinking capabilities, and code writing.
description.zh-CN: Kimi K2.6 是月之暗面最新主力模型，支持蜂群模式与百级 Agent 协同，并具备多模态理解、思考能力与代码编写能力。

description.en: It targets complex projects that require parallel sub-agents, multimodal inputs, and sustained coding or analysis across long workflows.
description.zh-CN: 适用于需要并行子智能体、多模态输入，并在长工作流中持续完成编码或分析的复杂项目。

description.en: Kimi K2.6 illustrates that flagship-level swarm collaboration and multimodal coding can be delivered at practical deployment cost, reinforcing that relatively low-cost models can still achieve high performance on large-scale agent workloads.
description.zh-CN: Kimi K2.6 表明：旗舰级蜂群协同与多模态编程可在务实部署成本下实现，进一步印证相对较低成本的模型同样能够在大规模智能体负载上达到高性能。

tagline.zh-CN: 思考链模型，边思考边用工具，复杂推理与工具调用

description.en: Kimi K2 Thinking is a chain-of-thought model that reasons while invoking tools, supporting complex inference and tool calls with reduced need for human intervention during multi-step runs.
description.zh-CN: Kimi K2 Thinking 是思考链模型，可在推理过程中同步调用工具，支撑复杂推理与工具调用，并降低多步执行过程中的人工干预需求。

description.en: It fits research assistants, automated analysis pipelines, and agent flows where thinking and tool use must alternate continuously until the task completes.
description.zh-CN: 适用于研究助手、自动化分析流水线，以及思考与工具调用需交替进行直至任务完成的智能体流程。

description.en: Kimi K2 Thinking shows that intertwined reasoning and tool use can be delivered at practical cost, supporting the view that relatively low-cost models can still achieve high performance on complex autonomous workflows.
description.zh-CN: Kimi K2 Thinking 表明：推理与工具调用的深度融合可在务实成本下落地，进一步印证相对较低成本的模型同样能够在复杂自主工作流上达到高性能。

summary.en: Catalog entry with polished capability overview.
summary.zh-CN: 图鉴条目已更新润色后的能力说明。

tagline.en: 295B / 21B active MoE — 256K context, deep thinking, agents & coding
tagline.zh-CN: 295B/21B 激活 MoE，256K 上下文，深度思考、智能体与编程

parameters.zh-CN: 总参数 2950 亿 / 激活 210 亿（MoE）

contextWindow.zh-CN: 256K（输入 192K / 输出 128K，约 14 万中文字符）

description.en: Hy3 Preview uses a MoE architecture with 295B total parameters and 21B active per inference.
description.zh-CN: Hy3 Preview 采用 MoE 架构，总参数 2950 亿，每次推理激活 210 亿。

description.en: Context length is 256K (input 192K / output 128K), holding roughly 140,000 Chinese characters; it supports interleaved deep thinking, JSON Schema structured output, Function Calling, and cache.
description.zh-CN: 上下文 256K（输入 192K / 输出 128K），可容纳约 14 万中文字符；支持深度思考（交错式）、结构化输出（JSON Schema）、Function Calling 与 Cache 缓存。

description.en: Use cases include long documents, Agent orchestration, coding assistance, knowledge-base Q&A, and contract review—MoE activation keeps serving cost practical while delivering high performance on long-context and tool-heavy workloads.
description.zh-CN: 适用于长文档处理、智能体/Agent 编排、编程辅助、知识库问答与合同审查；MoE 激活机制使服务成本更可控，同时在长上下文与重工具负载上仍能达到高性能。

summary.en: Refreshed specs: 256K context, MoE 295B/21B active, tools & agents.
summary.zh-CN: 更新规格：256K 上下文、MoE 2950 亿/激活 210 亿、工具与智能体能力。

title.en: Hy3 Preview Listed on BeyondMax AI
title.zh-CN: Hy3 Preview 上架 BeyondMax AI

summary.en: Catalog entry with polished capability overview.

tagline.en: Previous-generation general model — multimodal text-to-image/video & creative marketing
tagline.zh-CN: 上一代通用模型，多模态文生图/视频与创意营销

description.en: Hy2.0 is Tencent Hunyuan's previous-generation general model, offering multimodal capabilities including text-to-image and text-to-video generation for creative and marketing scenarios.
description.zh-CN: Hy2.0 是腾讯混元上一代通用模型，提供多模态能力，涵盖文生图、文生视频等，面向创意与营销场景。

description.en: It suits brand campaigns, social content pipelines, and creative production where visual and video assets must be generated from textual briefs.
description.zh-CN: 适用于品牌传播、社交内容流水线，以及需根据文本简报生成图像与视频素材的创意制作流程。

description.en: Hy2.0 shows that general multimodal creative generation can remain accessible at practical deployment cost, supporting the view that relatively low-cost models can still achieve high performance on marketing and media workloads.
description.zh-CN: Hy2.0 表明：通用多模态创意生成可在务实部署成本下保持可用，进一步印证相对较低成本的模型同样能够在营销与媒体类负载上达到高性能。

summary.en: Catalog entry with polished capability overview.
summary.zh-CN: 图鉴条目已更新润色后的能力说明。

tagline.en: Latest flagship dialogue — knowledge, math logic & programming
tagline.zh-CN: 最新旗舰对话模型，知识性、数学逻辑与编程能力

description.en: Doubao-Seed-1.8 is ByteDance's latest flagship dialogue model, emphasizing knowledge coverage, mathematical logic, and programming capability.
description.zh-CN: Doubao-Seed-1.8 是字节跳动最新旗舰对话模型，侧重知识性、数学逻辑与编程能力。

description.en: It fits general assistants, education and tutoring, and engineering chat where factual accuracy, structured reasoning, and code output must coexist in one model.
description.zh-CN: 适用于通用助手、教育与辅导，以及需要事实准确性、结构化推理与代码输出并存的工程对话场景。

description.en: Doubao-Seed-1.8 illustrates that flagship dialogue quality across knowledge, math, and code can be delivered at practical cost, reinforcing that relatively low-cost models can still achieve high performance on mixed cognitive workloads.
description.zh-CN: Doubao-Seed-1.8 表明：覆盖知识、数学与代码的旗舰对话能力可在务实成本下交付，进一步印证相对较低成本的模型同样能够在混合认知负载上达到高性能。

summary.en: Catalog entry with polished capability overview.
summary.zh-CN: 图鉴条目已更新润色后的能力说明。

tagline.en: Thinking & Flash — stronger reasoning or low latency for diverse business scenarios
tagline.zh-CN: Thinking 思考版与 Flash 极速版，强推理 / 低延迟，适配多业务场景

description.en: Doubao-Seed-1.6 offers two editions: Thinking prioritizes stronger reasoning, while Flash targets low latency—both adaptable to multiple business scenarios.
description.zh-CN: Doubao-Seed-1.6 提供两个版本：Thinking 思考版强化推理能力，Flash 极速版侧重低延迟响应，均可面向多业务场景适配。

description.en: Thinking suits analytics, planning, and decision support where inference depth matters; Flash fits high-frequency customer service, real-time assistants, and latency-sensitive interactive products.
description.zh-CN: Thinking 适用于分析、规划与决策支持等看重推理深度的场景；Flash 适用于高频客服、实时助手及对响应时延敏感的交互类产品。

description.en: Together, the 1.6 line shows that both reasoning depth and low-latency dialogue can be delivered at practical deployment cost, supporting the view that relatively low-cost models can still achieve high performance across diverse business workloads.
description.zh-CN: Seed 1.6 系列共同表明：强化推理与低延迟对话均可在务实部署成本下交付，进一步印证相对较低成本的模型同样能够在多样化业务负载上达到高性能。

summary.en: Catalog entry with polished capability overview.
summary.zh-CN: 图鉴条目已更新润色后的能力说明。

tagline.en: Image generation — multi-round edit, reference-image edit & variants
tagline.zh-CN: 图像生成，多轮编辑、参考图编辑与变体生成

description.en: Doubao-Seedream 4.5 is an image generation model supporting multi-round editing, reference-image editing, and variant generation from existing visuals.
description.zh-CN: Doubao-Seedream 4.5 是图像生成模型，支持多轮编辑、参考图编辑，以及基于现有视觉素材的变体生成。

description.en: It suits design iteration, e-commerce asset refinement, and creative pipelines where images are revised incrementally rather than regenerated from scratch each time.
description.zh-CN: 适用于设计迭代、电商素材精修，以及以增量修订而非每次从零生成的创意流水线。

description.en: Seedream 4.5 illustrates that advanced image editing and variant workflows can be delivered at practical cost, supporting the view that relatively low-cost models can still achieve high performance on visual production tasks.
description.zh-CN: Seedream 4.5 表明：高阶图像编辑与变体工作流可在务实成本下落地，进一步印证相对较低成本的模型同样能够在视觉制作任务上达到高性能。

summary.en: Catalog entry with polished capability overview.
summary.zh-CN: 图鉴条目已更新润色后的能力说明。

tagline.en: Medical vertical AI model for serious healthcare — evidence anchoring, 2.6% hallucination rate
tagline.zh-CN: 医疗垂类大模型，专注严肃医疗；证据锚定，幻觉率 2.6%

description.en: Baichuan-M3 Plus is Baichuan AI's medical vertical large model focused on serious healthcare settings.
description.zh-CN: Baichuan-M3 Plus 是百川智能面向严肃医疗场景的医疗垂类大模型。

description.en: It supports evidence-enhanced medical Q&A, clinical decision assistance, and medical education, using proprietary evidence-anchoring so each conclusion is tied to the original paper evidence passage.
description.zh-CN: 适用于循证增强医疗问答、临床辅助决策与医学教育；独创「证据锚定」技术，使每句结论可锚定至原始论文证据段落。

description.en: With a reported hallucination rate of 2.6% (described as the lowest globally) and API costs 70% lower than the previous generation, it shows that relatively low-cost models can still deliver high performance in rigorous medical workloads.
description.zh-CN: 公开称幻觉率仅 2.6%、为全球最低水平，且 API 成本较上一代降低 70%，表明相对较低成本的模型同样能够在严肃医疗场景中达到高性能。

summary.en: Catalog entry with polished capability overview.
summary.zh-CN: 图鉴条目已更新润色后的能力说明。

tagline.en: 100B+ parameter closed flagship — AlpacaEval 2.0 on par with GPT-4
tagline.zh-CN: 千亿参数闭源旗舰，AlpacaEval 2.0 与 GPT-4 互有胜负

description.en: Yi-Large is 01.AI's closed-source flagship model at 100B+ parameters.
description.zh-CN: Yi-Large 是零一万物千亿参数规模的闭源旗舰模型。

description.en: On AlpacaEval 2.0 it trades first place with GPT-4; it excels at long-text understanding, deep summarization, and logical analysis, with a distinctive ability to capture deeper logic and philosophical nuance in summaries.
description.zh-CN: 在 AlpacaEval 2.0 上与 GPT-4 互有第一；擅长长文本理解、深度总结与逻辑分析，能把握文本深层逻辑与哲学内涵，具备鲜明的「哲学家」式概括能力。

description.en: With a 16K context window (base version) and OpenAI-compatible APIs, it demonstrates flagship-grade depth and insight on analytical tasks, supporting the view that high performance can be achieved without relying solely on maximal scale.
description.zh-CN: 基础版本上下文长度为 16K，并兼容 OpenAI 接口格式；在分析类任务上展现旗舰级深度与洞察力，印证相对较低规模亦可达到高性能。

summary.en: Catalog entry with polished capability overview.
summary.zh-CN: 图鉴条目已更新润色后的能力说明。

tagline.en: 32K context — TTFT 0.34s, 47.19 tps, Reasoning, multi-format APIs
tagline.zh-CN: 32K 上下文，TTFT 0.34 秒、吞吐 47.19 tps，支持 Reasoning 与多格式接口

description.en: 360zhinao-turbo-doubao-seed-1-8 is offered via the 360 AI Brain API (api.360.cn/v1).
description.zh-CN: 360zhinao-turbo-doubao-seed-1-8 通过 360 智脑 API（api.360.cn/v1）接入。

description.en: It provides a 32,000-token context (max output 8,192), supports Reasoning, and is compatible with OpenAI Chat Completions, OpenAI Responses, Anthropic Messages, and Google Vertex AI formats.
description.zh-CN: 上下文长度 32,000 tokens、最大输出 8,192 tokens；支持 Reasoning 推理能力，并兼容 OpenAI ChatCompletions、OpenAI Responses、Anthropic Messages、Google VertexAI 四种接口格式。

description.en: Published metrics include TTFT 0.34s, throughput 47.19 tps, and 100% availability—indicating that relatively low-latency, cost-efficient serving can still deliver strong interactive performance.
description.zh-CN: 公开性能指标包括 TTFT 0.34 秒、吞吐量 47.19 tps、可用性 100%，表明相对较低延迟与成本的部署同样能够达到出色的交互性能。

summary.en: Catalog entry with polished capability overview.
summary.zh-CN: 图鉴条目已更新润色后的能力说明。

tagline.en: Native Agent model — built for execution, optimized for tool calling
tagline.zh-CN: 原生 Agent 模型，为「干活」而非「聊天」设计，工具调用从训练起优化

description.en: SkyClaw-v1.0 (flagship) is Kunlun Tech's native Agent model designed for task execution rather than open-ended chat, with tool use optimized from training.
description.zh-CN: SkyClaw-v1.0（旗舰版）是昆仑万维原生 Agent 模型，专为「干活」而非「聊天」设计，从训练阶段即针对工具调用优化。

description.en: It is deeply adapted to OpenClaw, Claude Code, and other mainstream frameworks, supporting multi-step task decomposition, tool invocation, and cross-module code generation.
description.zh-CN: 深度适配 OpenClaw、Claude Code 等主流框架，支持多步骤任务拆解与执行、工具调用及跨模块代码生成。

description.en: Suited to enterprise multi-step Agent workloads, complex code generation, and full product prototyping—with OpenAI-compatible APIs—showing that Agent-focused models can deliver high execution performance at practical deployment cost.
description.zh-CN: 适用于企业级多步骤 Agent 任务、复杂代码生成与完整产品原型开发；兼容 OpenAI 接口格式，表明面向 Agent 的模型可在务实成本下达到高执行性能。

summary.en: Catalog entry with polished capability overview.
summary.zh-CN: 图鉴条目已更新润色后的能力说明。

tagline.en: Lite Agent edition — faster, lower cost, core capabilities retained
tagline.zh-CN: 轻量版 Agent，核心能力保留，速度更快、成本更低

description.en: SkyClaw-v1.0-lite is the lightweight edition of Kunlun Tech's SkyClaw Agent line.
description.zh-CN: SkyClaw-v1.0-lite 是昆仑万维 SkyClaw Agent 系列的轻量版本。

description.en: It retains core Agent capabilities while offering faster responses and lower cost, with OpenAI-compatible APIs.
description.zh-CN: 在保留核心能力的同时速度更快、成本更低，并兼容 OpenAI 接口格式。

description.en: It targets high-frequency calls and cost-sensitive automation, including batch API use—demonstrating that a lower-cost Agent tier can still deliver reliable high performance for operational workloads.
description.zh-CN: 适用于高频调用、成本敏感型自动化场景与批量 API 调用，表明更低成本的 Agent 档位同样能够在运营类负载中保持可靠的高性能。

summary.en: Catalog entry with polished capability overview.
summary.zh-CN: 图鉴条目已更新润色后的能力说明。

tagline.en: Lightweight multimodal agent — native vision, 60% lower token use in search
tagline.zh-CN: 轻量化多模态智能体，原生视觉架构，信息搜索场景 Token 直降 60%

parameters.zh-CN: 更小参数量（多模态智能体架构）

description.en: SenseNova 6.7 Flash-Lite is SenseTime's lightweight multimodal agent model with a native multimodal architecture that removes the vision-to-text intermediate layer.
description.zh-CN: SenseNova 6.7 Flash-Lite 是商汤科技轻量化多模态智能体模型，采用原生多模态架构，取消视觉转文本中间层。

description.en: It can directly interpret complex web layouts, document structures, and financial charts for integrated see-think-act workflows; token consumption in information-search scenarios is reported to drop by 60%, with millisecond-level feedback.
description.zh-CN: 能以更小参数量直接看懂复杂网页布局、文档结构与财务图表，实现「看、想、做」一体化；信息搜索等场景 Token 消耗直降 60%，并具备毫秒级反馈。

description.en: Suited to data analysis, in-depth research, and PPT generation and other long-chain tasks; SenseNova-Skills is open source on GitHub—showing that lighter, lower-cost multimodal agents can still reach high performance on complex workflows.
description.zh-CN: 适用于数据分析、深度调研、PPT 生成等长链路复杂任务；SenseNova-Skills 已在 GitHub 开源，表明更轻量、更低成本的多模态智能体同样能够在复杂工作流中达到高性能。

summary.en: Catalog entry with polished capability overview.

tagline.en: First open-source release — 48B params, Apache 2.0, multilingual & multimodal
tagline.zh-CN: 首次开源，480 亿参数，Apache 2.0，多语言多模态长上下文

description.en: This 48-billion-parameter general foundation model is JD Technology's first open-source large model release.
description.zh-CN: 该 480 亿参数通用基础大模型是京东科技首次开源的大模型。

description.en: It supports multilingual and multimodal capabilities and long-context processing under the Apache 2.0 license (commercial-friendly).
description.zh-CN: 支持多语言、多模态与长上下文处理；开源协议为 Apache 2.0（商业友好）。

description.en: It is intended for e-commerce, finance, logistics, and related industries—an openly deployable base that lowers adoption cost while still targeting high capability at scale.
description.zh-CN: 适用于电商、金融、物流等多个行业，以可开源部署的方式降低采用成本，同时在大规模参数下仍追求高能力表现。

tagline.zh-CN: 行业定制企业版，支持私有化部署，成本较国际竞品降低 50% 以上

description.en: Jingyan Enterprise is JD Technology's enterprise edition large model, deeply customized for retail, finance, manufacturing, and related sectors.
description.zh-CN: 京言大模型企业版是京东科技面向零售、金融、制造等行业深度定制的企业版大模型。

description.en: It supports on-premise private deployment for data security and provides rich APIs for integration.
description.zh-CN: 支持企业私有化部署以保障数据安全，并提供丰富 API 接口便于集成。

description.en: Costs are stated to be more than 50% lower than international alternatives—showing that relatively low-cost enterprise models can still meet industry-specific high-performance requirements.
description.zh-CN: 相比国际竞品成本降低 50% 以上，表明相对较低成本的企业级模型同样能够满足行业场景的高性能需求。

tagline.en: AI video generation and visual design
tagline.zh-CN: AI 视频生成与视觉设计

description.en: Kling AI is developed by Kuaishou, with core capabilities in AI video generation and visual design.
description.zh-CN: 可灵 AI 由快手开发，核心能力覆盖 AI 视频生成与视觉设计。

description.en: It is suited to AI video production and visual design workflows.
description.zh-CN: 适用于 AI 视频制作与视觉设计工作流。

description.en: Kling AI illustrates that AI video generation and visual design can be delivered at relatively low cost—reinforcing that lower-cost models can still achieve high performance.
description.zh-CN: 可灵 AI 表明：AI 视频生成与视觉设计可在相对较低成本下交付，进一步印证低成本模型同样能够达到高性能。

tagline.en: AI image generation and AI video generation
tagline.zh-CN: AI 图像生成与 AI 视频生成

description.en: Jimeng AI is developed by FaceU (a ByteDance company), with core capabilities in AI image generation and AI video generation.
description.zh-CN: 即梦 AI 由脸萌科技（字节跳动旗下）开发，核心能力覆盖 AI 图像生成与 AI 视频生成。

description.en: It is suited to AI image and video creation workflows.
description.zh-CN: 适用于 AI 图像与视频创作工作流。

description.en: Jimeng AI illustrates that AI image and video generation can be delivered at relatively low cost—reinforcing that lower-cost models can still achieve high performance.
description.zh-CN: 即梦 AI 表明：AI 图像生成与 AI 视频生成可在相对较低成本下交付，进一步印证低成本模型同样能够达到高性能。

tagline.en: Smart document writing, PPT generation, and spreadsheet processing
tagline.zh-CN: 智能文档写作、PPT 生成与表格处理

description.en: WPS AI is developed by Kingsoft Office, with core capabilities in smart document writing, PPT generation, and spreadsheet processing.
description.zh-CN: WPS AI 由金山办公开发，核心能力覆盖智能文档写作、PPT 生成与表格处理。

description.en: It is suited to document authoring, presentation creation, and spreadsheet workflows.
description.zh-CN: 适用于文档撰写、演示文稿制作与表格处理工作流。

description.en: WPS AI illustrates that smart document writing, PPT generation, and spreadsheet processing can be delivered at relatively low cost—reinforcing that lower-cost models can still achieve high performance.
description.zh-CN: WPS AI 表明：智能文档写作、PPT 生成与表格处理可在相对较低成本下交付，进一步印证低成本模型同样能够达到高性能。

title.zh-CN: WPS AI 上架 Swift Horse

tagline.en: AI search, smart scanning, and learning assistant
tagline.zh-CN: AI 搜索、智能扫描与学习助手

description.en: Quark is developed by Alibaba, with core capabilities in AI search, smart scanning, and learning assistant features.
description.zh-CN: 夸克由阿里巴巴开发，核心能力覆盖 AI 搜索、智能扫描与学习助手。

description.en: It is suited to AI search, scanning-assisted capture, and learning support workflows.
description.zh-CN: 适用于 AI 搜索、扫描辅助采集及学习辅助工作流。

description.en: Quark illustrates that AI search, smart scanning, and learning assistant capabilities can be delivered at relatively low cost—reinforcing that lower-cost models can still achieve high performance.
description.zh-CN: 夸克表明：AI 搜索、智能扫描与学习助手能力可在相对较低成本下交付，进一步印证低成本模型同样能够达到高性能。

summary.en: Consumer application entry with polished capability overview.
summary.zh-CN: 应用产品条目已上架，并完成能力说明润色。
